title: vicia unguiculata
intro: Vicia unguiculata, also known as cowhage or velvet bean, is a perennial climbing legume native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Vicia unguiculata include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as acting as a natural muscle relaxant and anxiolytic. Herbal preparations of Vicia unguiculata typically involve drying and processing the plant's leaves and seeds into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
